metadata.title:
Puts Man in Field to Fight
Against "Sweat Shop"


Goods.
OPPOSE CHILD LABOR
Woman's Club Will Aid in
Movement in Behalf of
& Union Labor.

OPPOSE CHILD LABOR

pages.raw_text:
One of the greatest and most i'm
portant labor movements in the
history of the Inland Empire is
now on. The Union Card and La
bel league, which has been organ
lied for the purpose of establish
ing the union card and a strictly
union line of articles of merchan-
disc. bearing the union label, is be-
hind the movement. The league
win fight against child labor and
the sweat shop and will endeavor
to bring about more sanitary work
ing conditions.


A melting Of the league was held
Friday night and Lewis LeClair, a
member of the electrical workers
union and one of the best and
most enthusiastic hustlers in Spo.
kane's organized labor world, was
placed on steady salary to can
tyass the city for the purpose of
carrying out the purposes of the
organization.
